title: Prepositions a, de, en
subtitle: Use three tiny words everywhere.
overview: A often points to destination or recipient.
De often means from or of; en means in, on, or at.

sections.title: Three prepositions
rows: I am going to the store.

items.es: Voy a casa después del trabajo.
items.en: I am going home after work.

items.es: El café de esta tienda es bueno.
items.en: The coffee from this store is good.

items.es: Mi teléfono está en la mesa.
items.en: My phone is on the table.
